name: use-browser-priview
description: Standalone browser preview project for Finder and editor context menus.

scripts.check:vscode-adapter: node --check adapters/vscode/extension.js && node --check adapters/vscode/extension-runtime.js && node --check adapters/vscode/runtime-loader.js && node --check adapters/vscode/runtime-paths.js && node --check adapters/vscode/open-finder-preview.js && node --check packages/runtime/browser-preview.js && node --check packages/runtime/runtime-loader.js && node --check packages/runtime/session-store.js && node --check packages/runtime/preview-supervisor.js && bash -n adapters/vscode/open-finder-preview.sh && bash -n adapters/vscode/install-macos-finder-quick-action.sh
scripts.check:codex-app: node --check adapters/codex-app/patch-codex-open-with.js && bash -n adapters/codex-app/open-codex-preview.sh && bash -n adapters/codex-app/install-codex-app.sh && bash -n adapters/codex-app/uninstall-codex-app.sh
scripts.check:installers: bash -n install.sh && bash -n install.command && bash -n install-vscode.command && bash -n install-finder.command && bash -n install-codex-app.command
scripts.test: npm run check:vscode-adapter && npm run check:codex-app && npm run check:installers && npm run test:vscode-adapter-contract && npm run test:html-preview-contract && npm run test:directory-readme-default && npm run test:directory-preview-transient-fetch-retry && npm run test:markdown-link-href-normalization-contract && npm run test:port-reuse-after-upgrade && npm run test:safe-text-size-contract && npm run test:image-table-safe-text-size-rendering && npm run test:lazy-tree-loading && npm run test:focused-tree-loading && npm run test:preview-perf-log-contract && npm run test:current-directory-auto-expansion && npm run test:manual-collapse-beats-auto-open && npm run test:sidebar-scroll-restoration && npm run test:scroll-restoration-contract && npm run test:shared-runtime-layout && npm run test:preview-supervisor-restart && npm run test:shared-session-store && npm run test:finder-shared-session-reuse && npm run test:install-flows && npm run test:codex-app-patch && npm run test:bootstrap-inline-script-syntax
